synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20948 Oracle Linux 9 NetworkManager bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20948
description:
[1.54.0-3.0.1]
- disable MPTCP handling by default [Orabug: 34801142]
- add connectivity check via Oracle servers [Orabug: 32051972]
- Add a dropin file to make Networkmanager-dispatcher persistent [Orabug: 36989910]
- Drop 777 permissions from the NetworkManager-dispatcher drop-in directory [Orabug: 37581907]

[1:1.54.0-3]
- Rebuild due to wrong buildroot picked in last build

[1:1.54.0-2]
- Support reapplying sriov.vfs (RHEL-113953)
- Fix removing unrelated OVS ports (RHEL-121103)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20948

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20948.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
NetworkManager-1.54.0-3.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
NetworkManager-adsl-1.54.0-3.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/NetworkManager-1.54.0-3.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.54.0-3.0.1]
- disable MPTCP handling by default [Orabug: 34801142]
- add connectivity check via Oracle servers [Orabug: 32051972]
- Add a dropin file to make Networkmanager-dispatcher persistent [Orabug: 36989910]
- Drop 777 permissions from the NetworkManager-dispatcher drop-in directory [Orabug: 37581907]

[1:1.54.0-3]
- Rebuild due to wrong buildroot picked in last build

[1:1.54.0-2]
- Support reapplying sriov.vfs (RHEL-113953)
- Fix removing unrelated OVS ports (RHEL-121103)
